name: auto-review-v2
description: V2 auto-review prototype: parallel review lenses, foreach validation of findings, final reduce report. Review target should be described in AUTO_REVIEW_TARGET.md.

tasks.prompt: Read AUTO_REVIEW_TARGET.md if present. Review runtime/scheduler correctness and return JSON with a findings array.
Read AUTO_REVIEW_TARGET.md if present. Review permission/tool/worktree safety and return JSON with a findings array.
Read AUTO_REVIEW_TARGET.md if present. Review command UX, docs, and product contract fit. Return JSON with a findings array.

each.prompt: Validate this proposed finding against the repository evidence: ${item}. Return JSON with finding, verdict, evidence, and recommendedAction.

stages.prompt: Use Source Stage Context to produce an evidence-backed review report. Keep only findings with realistic impact and proportional fixes.
